0.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider == "argocd"
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| summarize count(), by:{argocd.sync.state}
0.title: Finished Sync Status

#
---

#### About this dashboard

Release v0.1.0, [Origin](https://github.com/Dynatrace/dynatrace-configuration-as-code-samples)

51.content:
### ArgoCD Sync and Deployment Pulse

This dashboard provides a comprehensive view of the status of ArgoCD notifications related to the deployment of new applications. It is designed to help platform engineers and DevOps teams monitor and manage their deployment processes effectively.

53.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider == "argocd" 
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| summarize errorRate = if(count() == 0, 0, else: toDouble(countIf(task.outcome == "failure")) / toDouble(count())*100)
53.title: Error Rate

60.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider == "argocd" 
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| summarize avg(duration)
60.title: Average Sync Duration

62.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider == "argocd" 
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| fields 
Duration = duration,
Application = deployment.service.name,
Status = argocd.sync.outcome,
Start = start_time,
End = end_time,
Repository = deployment.source.repo.url
| sort End
62.title: Finished Syncs

63.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| sort timestamp
| summarize status = takeLast(event.status), by:deployment.service.uid
| filter status == "started" 
| summarize countDistinct(deployment.service.uid)
63.title: Running Syncs

65.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider == "argocd" 
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| makeTimeseries avg=avg(duration), by:deployment.service.name
65.title: Average Sync Duration

66.query:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider == "argocd"
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| fields argocd.sync.state
| summarize count(), by:{argocd.sync.state}
66.title: Deployment Status

67.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter event.status == "finished" 
| filter event.provider == "argocd" 
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| summarize median(duration)
67.title: Median Sync Duration

68.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter event.provider == "argocd"
| maketimeseries eventsCount = count(), by:{event.status}, interval:5m
68.title: Sync Activities

69.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| sort timestamp
| summarize SyncStatus = takeLast(event.status), by:{deployment.service.uid, deployment.service.name, deployment.service.namespace}
| filter SyncStatus == "started" 
| fieldsAdd Application = deployment.service.name
| fieldsAdd Namespace = deployment.service.namespace
| fieldsRemove deployment.service.uid, deployment.service.name, deployment.service.namespace
69.title: Running Syncs

70.query:
fetch events 
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT" 
| filter event.category == "task" 
| filter event.type == "deployment" 
| filter in(deployment.service.name, $Application)
| sort timestamp
| summarize status = takeLast(event.status), by:deployment.service.uid
| filter status == "finished" 
| summarize countDistinct(deployment.service.uid)
70.title: Finished Syncs

variables.input:
fetch events
| filter event.kind == "SDLC_EVENT"
| filter event.category == "task"  
| filter event.provider=="argocd" 
| summarize distinctApplications = collectDistinct(deployment.service.name)
| expand distinctApplications
| sort distinctApplications
